reviews.review_description: I was kicked Out Of The Glad Guild Group Cuz The owner (PixelGTAG) wanted to kill me in the Glad Guild SMP For ‘Content’, The Server was then ruined so i said to everyone how it was now bad, Pixel Is A Toxic Person And I Wouldn’t Recommend Supporting His Game, Also His Mods On This Game Will Just Randomly Kick Or Ban You Because They Are Literal 4 Year olds Bro

developer_response.body:
We banned you from the server after YOU started being extremely toxic and started telling us to kill ourselves after we tried to kill you on minecraft when you started hacking, which afterwards you proceeded to send a video of a guy killing himself with a shotgun with the caption "Mind blowing." And the moderators kicked you because multiple different people said that you were on the game being toxic. We know it was you, don't pretend to be the better person when you are not. 

Thanks,

Glad Guild Team

reviews.review_description: Rehehehe very cool it has a long way to go
pp poo poo pp poo pp poo poo me when when when when me when pp pie
It has a lot of cool features it still is being worked on, but it's a game where you can chill and make new friends. I would definitely recommend it!!

Look now this game just came out so of course it won’t be that good but for a beginner game this is amazing. everything in here is original (that i know of). i’ve seen gorilla tag fan games and everything and lemming is giving inspiration to those to make his game and the people that are, are doing fantastic. enchantopia is a great experience and i love how it turned out. the creator (pixelgt) is a great guy he has literally been so nice and we’ve played vr for a while and he’s been awesome and he even inspired me to make my own game! (still in development) but i think everyone should support because this game will be wayyyyy better in the future and i think this will be successful so like play the game it’s amazing!
I like it bc I’m part of the mod team and clurr is like a slay queen
The owner of this game (pixelGTAG) is a predator, please do not support this horrible person. (also this game sucks)

Games actually good and works very well. 

By QUAN DIGGLE QUIGGLE
Very epic game! Biggest map I’ve seen for a gtag game!
